heading: Donation of air traffic control equipment to eligible sub-Saharan African countries
label: 3736 Donation of air traffic control equipment to eligible sub-Saharan African countries
text: It is the sense of the Congress that, to the extent appropriate, the United States Government should make every effort to donate to governments of sub-Saharan African countries determined to be eligible under air traffic control equipment that is no longer in use, including appropriate related reimbursable technical assistance.section 3703 of this title
